response.justification: Bogdan has a solid generalist engineering foundation spanning 15+ years across web, mobile, embedded, and distributed systems, with relevant language experience in TypeScript, JavaScript, C, and C++. However, the Principal IC6 role demands deep specialization in experimentation platforms, telemetry infrastructure, feature-flagging, and growth measurement systems — areas entirely absent from his resume. There is no evidence of A/B testing frameworks, experiment assignment or targeting, bias detection, rollout-risk management, or statistical analysis experience. His seniority framing as Senior/Staff at small-to-mid-size companies also falls short of the cross-team, multi-workstream technical leadership expected at IC6, and his current role at re:cinq, while interesting, does not demonstrate the scale or scope this position requires.
strengths: Proven low-latency distributed systems work at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic handling millions of HTTP requests per second, demonstrating production scale experience
Broad multi-language proficiency (TypeScript, C, C++, Java, D) covering several of the role's required language stack
Current AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work at re:cinq shows alignment with AI-first developer tooling trends
concerns: Zero experimentation platform experience — no A/B testing infrastructure, feature flags, experiment assignment, targeting, or rollout automation mentioned anywhere in the resume
No telemetry, metrics pipeline, or growth measurement systems background, which is the core technical pillar of this role
Seniority gap: Senior/Staff framing at boutique companies with no demonstrated IC6-level cross-team technical leadership, multi-workstream ownership, or enterprise-scale architectural influence

key_factors.factor: No experimentation or measurement platform experience
